response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014–2015 role; current work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical education
Extensive background in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and DevOps
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9+ years
Lacks documented exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or protocols (OPC UA, Modbus)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js) with no evidence of on-premises industrial platform development
